title: Xbox Game Pass Adds Charming yet Unsettling New Cozy Game this Week
body:
This week, Xbox subscribers have a reason to rejoice as the popular Xbox Game Pass service adds a new title that's set to provide hours of relaxing entertainment with a twist. Easy Delivery Co, a critically acclaimed driving game known for its calming atmosphere and mysterious undertones, is set to join the Xbox library on March 26, 2026, and will be available to play for all Xbox Game Pass subscribers.

Easy Delivery Co has been making waves in the gaming community since its release on Steam last year, with many players drawn to its unique blend of soothing driving mechanics and unsettling secrets. Developed by an indie studio, the game has garnered a dedicated following for its ability to transport players to a serene world that's both peaceful and eerie. As players embark on a series of deliveries across a tranquil landscape, they begin to uncover hints of a mysterious world beneath the surface, adding a layer of intrigue to the game's relaxing gameplay.

The addition of Easy Delivery Co to Xbox Game Pass marks a significant move by Microsoft to expand its gaming library with titles that cater to a wider range of tastes. While many gamers are drawn to fast-paced action and competitive multiplayer, others prefer more laid-back experiences that allow them to unwind and relax. Easy Delivery Co is poised to fill this niche, offering a calming driving experience that's perfect for players looking to take a break from the usual gaming fare.

The game's developer has hinted at the inspiration behind Easy Delivery Co's unique blend of relaxation and mystery. According to an interview, the studio aimed to create a game that would allow players to experience the calming effects of driving while still engaging with a narrative that's full of surprises. By combining soothing gameplay mechanics with subtle hints of a larger world, the developer has created a game that's both relaxing and thought-provoking.

As Easy Delivery Co joins the Xbox library, Xbox Game Pass subscribers can look forward to exploring a new and fascinating world. With its unique blend of driving gameplay and mystery, the game is poised to become a standout title in the Xbox library. Whether players are looking for a relaxing experience or a game with a deeper narrative, Easy Delivery Co is sure to provide hours of entertainment and engagement.

In conclusion, the addition of Easy Delivery Co to Xbox Game Pass is a significant move that highlights the service's commitment to catering to a diverse range of gaming tastes. As the Xbox library continues to grow and evolve, gamers can expect to see more titles that push the boundaries of innovation and creativity. With Easy Delivery Co now available on Xbox, subscribers can look forward to a new and captivating experience that's sure to provide hours of relaxation and intrigue.
